raw.subject: We are OPEN tomorrow Monday 5/25/2026
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're open tomorrow Monday 5/25/2026, and I'm curious about your business hours and availability.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find and book appointments.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that could showcase your services menu, work gallery, and booking CTA.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/beautiful-nails-manchester

Let's discuss how a simple online presence could benefit your business. I work with local businesses on a flat fee basis. Would you be open to a quick call to discuss further?
